text:
Michael (ミハエル, Mihaeru) is the man who helped examinees get to the 288th Hunter Exam site. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 148 

Appearance

Michael wears a plain sweater, has short hair parted to the side, long sideburns and a thick mustache. 

Background

Michael was hired by the Hunter Association to help examinees go to the 288th Hunter Exam site location. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Michael lives somewhere in Beeskafmarro at an apartment block no. 603. He provides Killua with a special credit card and instructs him to shop at Diksakura by the station and present the card at the checkout. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In the Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation the character's name is "Mikhail".
